pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target properties from 1.8 to 21 to support the new JDK.
Migrate from Spring Boot 2.6.0 to 3.5.5, which requires Java 17+ and Jakarta EE.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to comply with Spring Boot 3 requirements.

spring-base-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with the new repository namespace.

spring-base-lock/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with the new repository namespace.
Added spring-base-core dependency to access core framework utilities.
Added hutool-all dependency to utilize the Hutool utility library.
Added redisson-spring-boot-starter to enable Redisson-based distributed locking capabilities.
Replaced spring-boot-starter-data-redis with spring-boot-starter-aop, likely shifting from direct Redis operations to AOP-based locking mechanisms.

spring-base-sign/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent groupId from org.gy.framework to io.github.guanyang to align with the new repository namespace.
Removed the dependency on spring-base-util, likely due to refactoring or removal of shared utilities.

spring-base-util/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to support Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.

spring-base-xss/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the parent POM groupId to reflect a new organization or namespace.

spring-base-csrf/src/main/resources/META.general_idea: Update the auto-configuration class reference in spring.factories to reflect the new package name.
